meta.title: openAI Protocol — Invest in real OpenAI, Inc. shares with OPEN
meta.description: Invest in real OpenAI, Inc. shares through the OPEN token. Open presale on the Base network: pay with USDC, ETH or cbBTC, non-custodial and with on-chain liquidity.

legal.heroHeadline: Invest in OPEN. Real OpenAI, Inc. shares.

home.activitySubtitle: · OPEN buys and sells in real time
home.tokenomicsBody: Fixed supply of 21,000,000,000 OPEN, no mint function. The team is locked for 3 years (1-year cliff + 2-year linear vesting) and the treasury finances buybacks and burns with ecosystem usage. Presale OPEN tokens are received at TGE via claim.
home.tokenomicsBurn: of ecosystem fees are allocated to buy back and burn OPEN
home.faqTitle: Everything you need to know before investing.
home.faqSubtitle: Still have questions? Write to us and we'll answer before you invest.
home.valueMechanism: On-chain mechanism: a fraction of fees is routed to the protocol to buy back and burn OPEN, verifiably reducing circulating supply.
home.desktopMobileBody: Connect your wallet, buy or swap and track your portfolio in real time. The same seamless experience on any screen.

ecosystem: ChatGPT conversational assistant. Subscriptions and usage generate revenue that feeds the treasury and OPEN buybacks.
Models served via the OpenAI API. Every million tokens processed is billed; part of the fee buys back OPEN.
DALL·E generates images by diffusion. Credit-based consumption feeds the token buyback flow.
Sora generates video from text. Compute-intensive workloads, billed per rendered second.
Whisper provides voice and real-time transcription. Usage measured per minute of processed audio.
Codex programming copilot. Per-seat plan plus compute consumption per generated suggestion.

faq: What is OPEN and what does it do with my capital?

OPEN is the on-chain path of the openAI Protocol: holders' capital is invested in real OpenAI, Inc. shares and in the OpenAI services ecosystem. OPEN gives you participation in the openAI Protocol treasury, which buys and holds real OpenAI, Inc. shares and operates the OpenAI services ecosystem. Access on-chain today; after the IPO, the treasury keeps accumulating shares and buying back OPEN with revenue from the OpenAI API and OpenAI services.
How is investment in OpenAI, Inc. made?

The treasury allocates capital to buy real OpenAI, Inc. shares via SPV — before and after the IPO. In parallel it operates ChatGPT, the OpenAI API and the rest of OpenAI services services; 30% of their fees buy back and burn OPEN, and the rest strengthens share accumulation.
How do I buy OPEN?

Connect your wallet and pay with USDC, ETH, WETH or cbBTC on the Base network. You can also bring funds from other networks (Ethereum, Arbitrum, Solana, Bitcoin…) and we convert them to USDC in your Base wallet automatically. Tokens purchased in the presale are received at launch (TGE) via claim.
When do I receive my presale tokens?

At launch (TGE), via claim from your own wallet. The presale is public and open, with no per-wallet limit, at a price of 0.0005 USDC per OPEN and a maximum cap of 1,045,000 USDC set in the contract; funds are held in a Safe multisig.
Do I have to wait for the IPO to invest?

No. The presale is open: you invest today on-chain in real OpenAI, Inc. shares. The IPO is a market milestone, not the end of the protocol — The IPO does not close the cycle: the treasury keeps buying OpenAI, Inc. shares (public and private market), ChatGPT, the OpenAI API and the rest of the services generate usage revenue, and 30% of those fees are continuously allocated to buy back and burn OPEN.
How and when can I sell my OPEN?

At TGE you receive your OPEN via claim and, from that moment, the token has on-chain liquidity (40% of supply in the pool, with locked LP): you can swap it for ETH, USDC or other tokens from your wallet.
How is OPEN different from buying the stock on the market?

OPEN is the token of the openAI Protocol: you participate in the treasury that continuously accumulates equity in OpenAI, Inc., with on-chain liquidity and programmatic buyback funded by the OpenAI API and OpenAI services.
How is the OPEN price related to the shares?
OPEN participates in the protocol treasury with exposure to OpenAI, Inc.; market price may vary from NAV.
Who custodies my tokens?
You do. The protocol does not custody your OPEN: the purchase is signed from your own wallet and only you control the keys.
What fees are there?

The presale does not add its own fees: you pay the Base network fee (cents) and, if you pay with a token other than USDC or from another network, the market conversion cost, which is shown before confirming.
Is this a risk?

Like any investment, the value of OPEN can go up or down. Only invest what you can afford. With OPEN you participate in the treasury that invests in real OpenAI, Inc. shares — on-chain, with liquidity and a flywheel that stays active after the IPO.
How does the referral program work?

Share your personal link and receive 3% in OPEN from every purchase made through it. To get your link you need to have contributed at least 1,000 USD (in USDC) to the presale; you will find it in your Wallet. The bonus is credited on-chain in the presale contract and you receive it together with your tokens at the TGE claim. The bonus does not reduce what the referred buyer receives.
What happens after the IPO?

The IPO does not close the cycle: the treasury keeps buying OpenAI, Inc. shares (public and private market), ChatGPT, the OpenAI API and the rest of the services generate usage revenue, and 30% of those fees are continuously allocated to buy back and burn OPEN. OPEN continues to reflect the treasury: more OpenAI, Inc. shares, more service revenue and verifiable on-chain buybacks.
